mapper.select: select ci.id, ci.project_id, ci.item_name, ci.item_type, ci.version_no, ci.status, ci.repository_url, ci.remark, ci.created_by, creator.real_name as created_by_name, ci.updated_by, updater.real_name as updated_by_name, ci.created_at, ci.updated_at from config_item ci left join sys_user creator on creator.id = ci.created_by left join sys_user updater on updater.id = ci.updated_by where ci.project_id = #{projectId} and ci.id = #{id} and ci.is_deleted = 0

select id, project_id, item_name, item_type, version_no, status, repository_url, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted from config_item where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update config_item set item_name = #{itemName}, item_type = #{itemType}, version_no = #{versionNo}, status = #{status}, repository_url = #{repositoryUrl}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select br.id, br.project_id, br.baseline_type, br.version_no, br.baseline_name, br.snapshot_json, br.status, br.published_by, u.real_name as published_by_name, br.published_at, br.created_at from baseline_record br left join sys_user u on u.id = br.published_by where br.project_id = #{projectId} and br.id = #{id}
select id, project_id, baseline_type, version_no, baseline_name, snapshot_json, status, published_by, published_at, created_at from baseline_record where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id}
